title: pelargonium × cornvallii
intro: Pelargonium × cornvallii, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce stress and anxiety, and soothe skin irritations. Rose Geranium is often prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
